content: Just as the linguistic definition of reflexion frames it as both a passive physical reflection of light/information and an active deliberate cognitive process, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to incorporate a dual-mode structure: a passive 'reflection' mode that mirrors inconsistencies across the model's own generated outputs, and an active 'reflection' mode that deliberately revises flawed reasoning based on those captured inconsistencies. This dual structure builds directly on the dual semantic roots of the word reflexion that are often overlooked.
